text: Place on at least 2 border spaces. Take 1 card from the deck or in reputation range.
name: Zoo School

text: Place next to at least 1 rock space.
name: Adventure Playground

text: Place next to at least 1 water space.
name: Water Playground

text: Place on 2 border spaces. Need not be adjacent to other buildings. / Income: Gain $2 for each building, except empty standard enclosures, next to the side entrance. / Gain 5 appeal if zoo is completely covered.
name: Side Entrance

text: Gain 1 appeal for each connected water space. / Gain 1 CP for each 2 unconnected water spaces.
name: Native Seabirds

text: Gain 1 appeal for each connected rock space. / Gain 1 CP for each 2 unconnected rock spaces.
name: Native Lizards

text: Gain 1 appeal for each connected border space without buildings. / Gain 1 CP for each group of 6 spaces without buildings.
name: Native Farm Animals

text: Gain 1 CP for 5 different animal category icons.
name: Guided School Tours

text: Each time you gain a continent or animal category icon that is not yet in your zoo, gain 1 appeal and $2 . / $2 for each different continent or animal category icon in your zoo.
name: Explorer

text: If you play a large animal, you may ignore 1 condition of your choice. / You may place 1 5-space enclosure for free.
name: Waza Large Animal Program

text: Gain 1 appeal for each connected space with a placement bonus. / Gain 1 CP for each 2 unconnected spaces with a placement bonus.
name: Free-Range New World Monkeys

text: 1 CP per 2 different continent/animal icons; others get $2 for each CP you earn
name: Basic Research*

text: # Research icons : 1 Appeal each / ANY Research icon played : $2 / 5 different Animal icons : 1 CP
name: Science Library*

text: 1 X-token / Venom, Constriction, Hypnosis & Pilfering do not affect you / 5 different Continent icons : 1 CP
name: Quarantine Lab*

text: 2 Reputation / 5 different Continent icons : 1 CP
name: Foreign Institute*

text: Choose Small or Large Animals; reveal cards from deck and add the first of the chosen type to hand / You can no longer play the other (unchosen) animal type; gain 2 Appeal per Small, or 4 Appeal per Large Animal played.
name: Waza Special Assignment*

text: Place the Sea Turtle Tank special tile next to at least 1 Water / Sell up to 2 cards for $4 each when you play a Reptile icon (Sunbathing 2)
name: Sea Turtle Tank*

text: 1 Appeal + 1 CP / 5 different Animal icons : 1 CP
name: Guided School Toours*

text: Gain $1 for each kiosk in other zoos. / Place a kiosk. / If you have 5 kiosks, gain 1 CP .
name: Franchise Business

text: Each time a sea animal icon is played into any zoo, gain $3 .
name: Marine Biologist

text: Gain 1 CP for each kiosk with at least 3 empty building spaces next to it (max. 3 CP ).
name: Farm Cat

text: Each time you play a Europe icon into your zoo, you may mark 1 Animal card after finishing the current action. / Gain 1 CP if you did 3 donations.
name: Conference on Europe

text: Each time you play an Australia icon into your zoo, you may increase the size of a standard enclosure by 1 for free. If the enclosure is occupied, gain 2 appeal . / Gain 1 appeal for each card pouched (max. 5).
name: Conference on Australia

text: Expedition | You may send a person Sponsor card in your zoo away (discard) to gain 1 CP OR Scuba Dive 3 | Reveal the 3 topmost cards of the deck. Choose 1 Sponsor card and add it to your hand. Discard the other cards.
name: Marine Research Expedition

text: Gain placement bonuses twice for placing this building. / Gain 1 CP if all placement bonuses are covered.
name: Excavation Site

text: Treat all 3-space enclosures on at least 1 border space as 5-space enclosures. / Gain 1 CP if all border spaces are covered.
name: Expansion Area

text: When making a donation, pay $1 less for each science in your zoo. / You may make 1 donation.
name: Publications

text: Income: Gain 1 appeal . / Gain 2 appeal for each zoo with higher appeal (score last).
name: Mascot Statue

text: Each time a Petting Zoo Animal icon is played into any zoo , gain $2 . / Search the discard pile for 1 Petting Zoo Animal and take it into hand.
name: Horse Whisperer

text: Each time you build a pavilion, gain 1 X-token -marker (max. 1 per action).
name: Landscape Gardener

text: Gain 3 Reputation
name: Field Research Type D Orcas

text: Place next to at least 1 water space and 1 rock space.
name: Amazon House

text: Can accommodate sea animal (max. 2 markers). / Place on 2 water spaces. / Gain 3 appeal / 5 appeal for 1/2 adjacent aquariums.
name: Underwater Tunnel

text: Do not gain placement bonuses anymore. / You may reposition up to 3 buildings. You may build 1 pavilion and 1 kiosk.
name: Reconstruction
